title: Greek Lamb Kebabs with Mediterranean Flair
description: A delicious and flavorful summer dish, perfect for grilling. The combination of lamb, vegetables, and herbs creates a tasty and refreshing meal.
instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread the lamb, onion, bell pepper, and zucchini onto skewers.
5. Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
7. During the last 2 minutes of grilling, brush the kebabs with lemon juice and sprinkle with mint leaves.
8. Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with additional mint leaves if desired.
